name: Corn & Zucchini Quesadilla (Tomato Salsa & Av
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salsa and relish. Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Place 2 tortillas on an ungreased cookie sheet. Sprinkle half the cheeses, onion, jalapeno, zucchini, and corn on each tortilla. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Top one of the tortillas with the remaining ingredients, then place the third tortilla on top.
5. Transfer to the oven and bake until cheese has melted and tortillas are becoming crisp (about 10 minutes).
6. Cut tortilla into quarters, garnish each with tomato salsa and avocado relish, and serve hot.
